meaning: n.日德兰半岛(北欧的半岛)
examples: At sea the Battle of Jutland takes place.
Excellent quality beers are made in Jutland and consumption is high.
He drives until the car stops all by itself, high above central Jutland.
In 1916, during World War I, British and German fleets fought the Battle of Jutland off Denmark.
Jutland, and the island Laeso in particular, are among the last European strongholds of the Alcon blue.
